name: Sarnapur (Yogurt and Chard Soup)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Chopped Swiss chard leaves, packed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, add walnuts to water and bring to boil. Simmer until slightly tender, about 5 minutes.
2. Add rice and cover. Simmer until done, about 15 minutes.
3. In a medium pan, cook chard in 2 cups of water until tender, 2-3 minutes. Drain well.
4. In a small bowl, stir flour into yogurt until smooth.
5. Stir the yogurt mixture into the rice. Bring to a slow boil and stir constantly until thickened, about 1 minute.
6. Add the cooked yogurt and chard to the rice. Stir in cilantro and mint.
7. Season with salt to taste. Cook for an additional 3 minutes. Serve hot or cold.
Makes 4 servings. Each serving contains approximately 382 calories; 249 milligrams of sodium; 3 milligrams of cholesterol; 10 grams of fat; 57 grams of carbohydrates; 16 grams of protein; and 1.08 grams of fiber.
